issuerType: British Virgin Islands business company; not registered as an investment company, AIF, UCITS, or equivalent regulated fund vehicle
legalStructure: Tokenized secured note issued by Ondo Global Markets (BVI) Limited; USDY provides economic exposure to short-term U.S. Treasuries but does not give holders rights to hold or receive U.S. Treasuries
minimumInvestment: 1.00 USD for Ondo Global Markets investing/redeeming; 5,000 minimum for minting/redeeming USDY on Sui, Aptos, Stellar, XRP, or Noble; USD bank wires possible for deposits of 100,000 USD or more
targetInvestors: Qualifying non-U.S. individual and institutional investors; in the EEA and UK, offered solely to qualified investors; in Switzerland, solely to professional clients

metadata.serviceProviderRole: Provides tokenization services to, and is an equity holder of, Ondo Global Markets (BVI) Limited
regulatoryNotes: USDY tokens have not been registered under the U.S. Securities Act of 1933 or securities laws of any other jurisdiction.
USDY may not be offered or sold in the U.S. or to U.S. persons unless registered or exempt.
The issuer is not registered as an investment company under the U.S. Investment Company Act of 1940.
